job.title: Experienced C# / Angular Developer M/F
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our technical team in Montpellier to develop modern web applications with C# and Angular. You work on strategic projects for public and private sector clients.
mission.1: Develop C# / ASP.NET Core and Angular applications
mission.3: Perform code reviews and mentor junior developers
mission.4: Participate in the technical design of solutions
mission.6: Contribute to continuous improvement of practices
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in software development
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience C# et Angular
profile.3: Proficiency in .NET Core, TypeScript, SQL Server
profile.5: Team spirit et aptitude au mentoring
